name: claude-code-utils
title: Claude Code Utils
description: Browse your Claude Code sent/received messages, create snippets, easy access to your agents/commands, browse Claude Code changelog and see all Claude Code commands and shortcuts
author: marcospmail

commands.name: create-snippet
commands.title: Create Snippet
commands.description: Create a new reusable code snippet

commands.name: browse-snippets
commands.title: Browse Snippets
commands.description: View, search, and manage your saved code snippets

commands.name: received-messages
commands.title: Received Messages
commands.description: Browse messages received from Claude with AI-powered search

commands.name: sent-messages
commands.title: Sent Messages
commands.description: Browse messages you sent to Claude

commands.name: cheatsheet
commands.title: Commands Cheat Sheet
commands.description: Quick reference for all Claude Code commands and keyboard shortcuts

commands.name: browse-agents
commands.title: Browse Agents
commands.description: View and manage your Claude Code agents from ~/.claude/agents

commands.name: browse-commands
commands.title: Browse Commands
commands.description: View and manage your Claude Code commands from ~/.claude/commands

commands.name: changelog
commands.title: Changelog
commands.description: View Claude Code changelog with latest updates and releases

commands.name: search-sessions
commands.title: Search Sessions
commands.description: Deep search through all Claude Code session content

commands.name: transform-selection
commands.title: Transform Selection
commands.description: Transform selected text using Claude AI

commands.name: chat
commands.title: Chat
commands.description: Send a quick chat message to Claude and get a response

commands.name: usage-monitor
commands.title: Claude Usage
commands.description: Monitor Claude AI usage limits in real-time from the menu bar

preferences.name: claudeCliPath
preferences.title: Claude CLI Path
preferences.description: Custom path to the Claude CLI binary (leave empty for auto-detection)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
